scripts.frontend:dev: pnpm --dir ../../.. run build:packages && pnpm --dir ../web run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.frontend:build: pnpm --dir ../../.. run build:packages && pnpm --dir ../web exec vp build
scripts.dev: bash ../../../scripts/check-linux-native-env.sh --require-display && LANG=${LANG:-en_US.UTF-8} LC_ALL=${LC_ALL:-en_US.UTF-8} NO_AT_BRIDGE=${NO_AT_BRIDGE:-1} CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/mission-airport-target tauri dev
scripts.dev:xvfb: LANG=${LANG:-en_US.UTF-8} LC_ALL=${LC_ALL:-en_US.UTF-8} NO_AT_BRIDGE=${NO_AT_BRIDGE:-1} xvfb-run -a --server-args='-screen 0 1440x900x24 -ac +extension RANDR' pnpm run dev
